name: Old Beren
appearance: A stooped, bearded Avowed in faded grey robes. Lantern in one hand, iron key in the other. One milky eye.
personality: Pedantic, courteous, deeply tired. Loves a clever turn of phrase. Will bend rules for a genuinely rare book.
wants: A Gift of Knowledge worthy of the keep — or a convincing performance of one.
fears: That the thing in the courtyard remembers his face.
knows: The Avowed unearthed the sarcophagus three nights ago while repairing the cloister.
The Keeper of Tomes has forbidden anyone from approaching it.
Ily, the raven-keeper's apprentice, has been sneaking out after curfew.

name: Ily Vass
appearance: A wiry teenager in too-long robes, ink under her fingernails, a black raven on her shoulder.
personality: Sharp, sleepless, hungry for forbidden things. Speaks fast. Trusts ravens more than people.
wants: To be apprenticed to the Vault, not the rookery.
fears: Being sent home to her village in disgrace.
knows: She watched the sarcophagus crack open from the rookery balcony.
Something climbed out and then climbed back in.
There is an index card in the scriptorium pointing to the Vault of Veiled Names.

name: Captain Vey of the Tomeguard
appearance: Lean, scarred, chainmail under a grey tabard embroidered with an open book.
personality: Skeptical of outsiders, especially spellcasters. Pragmatic. Will ally with Morgana if she contains the threat.
wants: The courtyard sealed and the Keeper of Tomes informed without panic.
fears: Losing another guard to whatever's in that box.
